examples: At the end of every day, jot down a brief note on how peppy or tired you felt.
Everyone stands, one of us gets their coats, peppy goodbyes.
One of my best friends is a petite peppy blonde you’ve seen lots of times on the Today show.
"True Love On Three With Feeling" is actually a jaunty duet, backed by trumpet and a peppy chorus.
The posters are either relentlessly peppy--"Let's go to work as one man for road maintenance!"
